title: HCF and LCM
summary: HCF and LCM is a focused topic inside Real Numbers. It is mainly about connecting prime factorization and algorithmic reasoning to highest common factor and least common multiple.
bullet_points: Goal: Compute HCF and LCM using theorem-based number reasoning|Difficulty band: medium|Chapter: Real Numbers

title: Trigonometric Ratios
summary: Trigonometric Ratios is a focused topic inside Introduction to Trigonometry. It is mainly about defining sine, cosine, tangent and related ratios for an acute angle in a right-angled triangle.
bullet_points: Goal: Compute and interpret trigonometric ratios from triangle sides|Difficulty band: easy|Chapter: Introduction to Trigonometry

title: Classical Probability
summary: Classical Probability is a focused topic inside Probability. It is mainly about using favorable outcomes over total equally likely outcomes to compute simple probabilities.
bullet_points: Goal: Solve introductory probability problems using the classical definition|Difficulty band: easy|Chapter: Probability
